Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class DashboardComponentColumn

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.DashboardComponentColumn
public class DashboardComponentColumn extends Object

Java class for DashboardComponentColumn complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="DashboardComponentColumn">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="breakPoint1" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="breakPoint2" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="breakPointOrder" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="highRangeColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="lowRangeColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="midRangeColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="reportColumn" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="showSubTotal" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="showTotal" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="type" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DashboardComponentColumnType"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
